name: MCP WeChat Publisher
postCreateCommand: npm install && npm run build && (crontab -l 2>/dev/null; echo '* * * * * gh codespace ports visibility 3000:public -c $CODESPACE_NAME 2>/dev/null; pgrep -f "node dist/http-server" > /dev/null || nohup node /workspaces/wechat-mcp-server/dist/http-server.js > /tmp/wechat-server.log 2>&1 &') | crontab -
postStartCommand: gh codespace ports visibility 3000:public -c $CODESPACE_NAME 2>/dev/null; pgrep -f 'node dist/http-server' > /dev/null || nohup node dist/http-server.js > /tmp/wechat-server.log 2>&1 &
